title: Fix a constant identifier naming error in the Chinese documentation
author: yusn
body:

comments.author: protobi-pieter
comments.body:
谢谢你修复这个命名不一致的问题！🎉 (Thanks for fixing this naming inconsistency!)

Your fix improves code consistency in the Chinese documentation. We've adopted this into our actively maintained fork at https://github.com/protobi/exceljs.

Your contribution is appreciated and credited in commit 2d1ddcf.
